title: stipa apertifolia subsp. longiglumis
intro: Stipa apertifolia subsp. longiglumis, also known as a type of grass, is a species of plant that belongs to the family Poaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Stipa apertifolia subsp. longiglumis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and aid in wound healing. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made by infusing the dried leaves and stems in hot water to create a tea or by using the essential oils extracted from the plant for various applications.
